instructions.instruction: **Use `async: true` only when safe** — avoid for DB contexts with shared rows, LiveView, `Application.put_env`, and external services
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `async: true` only when safe** — avoid for DB contexts with shared rows, LiveView, `Application.put_env`, and external services
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Define test data in fixtures** (`test/support/`) — never build it inline across multiple tests
instructions.original_snippets: **Define test data in fixtures** (`test/support/`) — never build it inline across multiple tests
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Use `has_element?/2` and `element/2` for LiveView assertions** — not `html =~ "text"` for structure checks
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `has_element?/2` and `element/2` for LiveView assertions** — not `html =~ "text"` for structure checks
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Always test the unauthorized case** for any protected resource
instructions.original_snippets: **Always test the unauthorized case** for any protected resource
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never hardcode dates** — use relative timestamps to prevent flaky tests
instructions.original_snippets: **Never hardcode dates** — use relative timestamps to prevent flaky tests
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Check existing fixtures** — inspect `test/support/fixtures/` for relevant fixtures before creating new ones
instructions.original_snippets: **Check existing fixtures** — inspect `test/support/fixtures/` for relevant fixtures before creating new ones
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Create fixture if needed** — add to the appropriate fixtures module (see Fixture Pattern below)
instructions.original_snippets: **Create fixture if needed** — add to the appropriate fixtures module (see Fixture Pattern below)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Verify compilation** — run `mix test` to confirm the fixture compiles before writing any tests
instructions.original_snippets: **Verify compilation** — run `mix test` to confirm the fixture compiles before writing any tests
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Write the failing test** — implement the test case; run `mix test path/to/file_test.exs` and confirm it fails with a meaningful message (not a compile error)
instructions.original_snippets: **Write the failing test** — implement the test case; run `mix test path/to/file_test.exs` and confirm it fails with a meaningful message (not a compile error)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Verify the failure message** — the failure should describe a missing behaviour, not a setup problem
instructions.original_snippets: **Verify the failure message** — the failure should describe a missing behaviour, not a setup problem
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger testing-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Verify the test passes** — re-run `mix test path/to/file_test.exs` and confirm green
instructions.original_snippets: **Verify the test passes** — re-run `mix test path/to/file_test.exs` and confirm green
